channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Zipline Jammed, 19th April
item.description:
The mechanism in the zipline is not running smoothly causing it to be difficult to move. The gears need unjamming or lubricating.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Martens Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Forest Human Hire Bikes Parked Dangerously, 19th April
item.description:
9 Forest Human Hire Bikes Parked Dangerously on the pavement at Swiss Court next to TWG Tea.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitcomb Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on double yellows outside lidl, 19th April
item.description:
Parked on double yellow lines. Multiple instances, causes traffic, blocks busstop, but no consequences. Reported multiple times over several months but nothing ever happens.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 129, Sydenham Road, Perry Vale, Sydenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 19th April
item.description:
Dead fox

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wolsey Close, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 19th April
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Concorde Way, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish thrown over fence, 19th April
item.description:
Close to the roundabout

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middle Park Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 19th April
item.description:
Another random bit of flytipping on the side of the road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham Palace Road, Eltham

item.title: East street tp is sprayed, 19th April
item.description:
A COUPLE OF FREE BAY TP IS SPRAYED ON EAST STREET AT LPs 26 AND 27
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Datchelor Place. Take it away, 19th April
item.description:
5 days. Voi, you take too long

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Datchelor Place, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Datchelor Place. Told the guy he might get fined but he shrugged, not caring, 19th April
item.description:
Day 1

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Datchelor Place, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Diseased and dangerous trees., 19th April
item.description:
A previously locked away part of Betts Park is currently being cleared by volunteers to turn into a community garden. Some of the trees in this area look diseased and may be in danger of falling, which poses a risk to the volunteer s working in this part of the park.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 210, Anerley Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unsafe broken railing, 19th April
item.description:
Two bolts are removed from the safety fence and now that section wobbles and could be pushed over.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mill Vale, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 Colonnade, street below the tunnel, 19th April
item.description:
The street is in poor condition, and these potholes have been left unrepaired for months. They pose a significant safety risk to pedestrians, as it is very easy to twist an ankle while walking. Could these be repaired as soon as possible, please?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colonnade, King's Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car left for weeks, 19th April
item.description:
The car has been parked on the yellow line for several weeks on Jenner close behind Elm road. It always has parking tickets on the windscreen
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jenner Close, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 19th April
item.description:
White graffiti tag on this bus stop shelter (on side facing Croydon direction).
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 379, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Graffiti, 19th April
item.description:

item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Fly tipping, 19th April
item.description:
Abandoned suitcase left on Marion crescent and road needs cleaning as there’s garbage

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Marion Crescent, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Table and briwn food bin, 19th April
item.description:
Table and brown food bin dumped on the pavement Church Road, could you please collect it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking restriction sign knocked over, 19th April
item.description:
A Parking restriction sign has been knocked over, and is blocking the footpath and the upturned concrete is a trip hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Connaught Road, Stroud Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
